nasb.text: Then a shoot will spring from the stem of Jesse, And a branch from his roots will bear fruit.

esv.text: There shall come forth a shoot from the stump of Jesse, and a branch from his roots shall bear fruit.

cnv.text: 從耶西的樹幹必生出一根嫩芽， 從他的根而出的枝條必結果子。

ccb.text: 就像树墩上长出新的枝条， 大卫的后裔中必有一人做王。

csbs.text: 从耶西的树墩必发出一个嫩芽， 从他的根而出的枝子必结果实。
